$comment: DESIGN-ONLY STUB — NOT submitted to a Scoop bucket. Reference for a future native Windows install path (#90). The supported path today is the thin npx bootstrap (install.ps1); see docs/WINDOWS_INSTALL.md. Deferred until archon-setup ships a standalone binary (it currently runs via npx).
description: Plug-and-play repo bootstrapper for the ArchonVII ecosystem.
notes: archon-setup currently ships via npx; a real Scoop manifest is deferred until a standalone binary exists. To run today: npx @archonvii/archon-setup
